homepage.title: Rotary Shaft Seal Manufacturer - CinchSeal
homepage.description: Rotary shaft seals for mixers, screw conveyors, and bulk-handling equipment. Self adjusting seals eliminate wear, leakage, and downtime.

The Rotary Shaft Seal advantage
Increases ROI by 20 times
Handles ¼-in. shaft runout while maintaining the seal
Spins with the shaft to eliminate shaft damage and wear
Prevents product recalls and leaks
Stops foreign material migration
Protects bearings and gearboxes
Reduces unscheduled downtime
We serve 2/3 of world’s top food companies, and major players in every processing industry from chocolate, bakery, and pharmaceutical to chemical, battery, wastewater treatment, and mining. Our customers include BASF, Cargill, Kraft Heinz, Nestle, Mars, Mondelez International, The Hershey Company, Tyson Foods, Peerless, and WAM.

CINCHSEAL® ROTARY
SHAFT SEALING SOLUTION
CinchSeal® self-adjusting and maintenance-free rotary shaft seals are designed for CEMA screw conveyors and bulk solids mixing and blending equipment. FDA-approved silicon and PTFE-wearable seal components make the seals sanitary and safe for food, pharmaceutical, and chemical bulk-processing applications. Seal housings are offered in a variety of materials, including 316L stainless steel.
Watch The Video
View Rotary Seals

HOW CINCHSEAL SAVES ONE OF THE LARGEST BAKERY COMPANIES $100,000 E

about.text:
About Us - Rotary Shaft Seal Manufacturer CinchSeal
About Rotary Shaft Seal Manufacturer CinchSeal
Home
About Us
About CinchSeal
For nearly 30 years, CinchSeal has been a trusted provider of
rotary shaft seals
, supporting the industrial processing sector with innovative sealing solutions. Our mission is to create products that meet unique requirements, ensuring top performance and fostering long-lasting partnerships.
We are driven by a vision to address the industry’s toughest challenges, offering custom and standard rotary shaft seals engineered for outstanding durability. Designed to withstand high temperatures, rapid speeds, and abrasive materials, our seals excel in demanding applications.
At CinchSeal, we are dedicated to exceeding expectations by delivering exceptional service and reliable solutions that keep your operations running smoothly.
United States
Headquarters
Successful Custom Seals
and Counting
Global Countries
Satisfied Customers
and Counting
Years In Business
OEM Partners
Industrial Sealing Solutions
Download Our Brochure & Catalog
Self-adjusting rotary shaft seals for
industrial screw conveyors
, ribbon blenders, paddle mixers, and all types of bulk-handling equipment have made CinchSeal® a leading rotary seal manufacturer for over 25 years.
Using air purge or nitrogen purge, our self-adjusting screw conveyor seals, externally adjustable blender seals, and cartridge seals keep product away from the seal, minimizing product loss and maintenance costs.
CinchSeal® provides industrial sealing solutions to industries from food processing to cement production. We also design improved shaft seals for OEM producers for use in bagging machinery, sifters, mixers, and size reduction equipment.
Our solid sealing technology serves various processes and OEM industries such as:

Bakery

products.text:
Rotary Shaft Seal Products - CinchSeal
Rotary Shaft Seal Products
Home
Rotary Shaft Seal Products
Rotary shaft seals by CinchSeal eliminate wear and leaks in industrial mixing and bulk handling equipment by spinning along with the shaft. The 7500 Series of seals is a must for bucket elevators, screw conveyors, and other bulk solid applications. For unmatched sanitary seals, the 7800 and 9700 Series are made from 316 Stainless Steel. For help choosing the right rotary shaft seal for your equipment, don’t hesitate to
contact us
Airless Rotary Face Seal
ce seals
are “airless” seals that operate without the n
eed for air purging, making them ideal for applications where a purging air supply is unavailable, or where the presence of air can contaminate the handled product.
Learn More
High Speed Chopper Seal
Chopper seals
withstand the high shaft speeds of industrial chopper machines used in agriculture, wastewater treatment, and food processing. They are engineered to handle abrasive substances, solid particles, and powders without shaft damage.
Learn More
7500 CEMA Screw Conveyor Rotary Shaft Seals
Our 7500 CEMA Screw Conveyor CinchSeal
is designed for zero maintenance due to the unique self adjusting design. These seals are ideal for screw conveyors, bucket elevators, and similar bulk solid applications.
Learn More
7600 Industrial Seals for Large Equipment
The maintenance free 7620 and 7650 solid aluminum CinchSeals
are designed for larger shaft sizes ranging from 3.937” up to 6.00”. They are ideal for screw conveyors, bucket elevators, and other bulk handling equipment.
Learn More
7800 CEMA Screw Conveyor Rugged Rotary Shaft Seals
The newly designed 7800 Series
CinchSeal for screw conveyors and other bulk handling equipment is made out of 316 Stainless Steel to handle dry and slurry products in the
food service
pharmaceutical
and
chemical industries
Learn More
9700 Split SS Seal – Rotary Shaft Seals
The 9700
split seal is machined out of stainless steel and all internal parts meet USDA standards for indirect food contact. This split seal is recommended for industries that require stainless steel due to sanitary requirements.
Learn More
Cartridge Seals
Our CinchSeal Cartridge Seal
, custom made for specific applications, is designed to replace lipseals on screw conveyor drive adapter plates such as Dodge, Linkbelt and Falk.
Learn More
Poly Split CEMA Seals
The model PS CinchSeal®
is maintenance free and designed to seal screw conveyors, mixing and blending equipment. It is manufactured out of polypropylene and stainless steel to handle dry powder and slurry products in the food service, pharmaceutical and chemical industries where stainless steel is required.
Learn More
Bakery Dough Flow Seals
Designed for bakery customers experiencing product leakage and sanitation issues due to dough/water leaking out the ends of the dual shafts on their dough pump augers.
Learn More
What Are Rotary Shaft Seals?
Learn More
High Speed Mechanical Seals for ANSI Pumps
